summary: Phase 20A/B/C Testing Complete - Backend fully functional (12/12 tests passed). Frontend mostly working with 1 CRITICAL bug in Assessment dialog preventing form fields from rendering.

critical_bugs.issue: React runtime error: 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string' - Dialog form fields not rendering
critical_bugs.impact: CRITICAL - Admin cannot create new assessment sessions via UI dialog. The 'Assign ke Client User' dropdown and 'Tenggat (Due Date)' field are not visible due to React error
critical_bugs.root_cause: SelectItem component in the 'Assign ke Client User' dropdown has an empty string value option ('— Tanpa binding —' option at line 335)
critical_bugs.suggested_fix: Change line 335 from <SelectItem value="">— Tanpa binding —</SelectItem> to <SelectItem value="_none">— Tanpa binding —</SelectItem> and handle '_none' value in form submission logic

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login successful
Backend: Client login successful
Backend: GET /api/assessment/templates returns 4 templates
Backend: POST /api/assessment/templates creates new template
Backend: POST /api/assessment/templates/{id}/publish toggles published state
Backend: POST /api/assessment/sessions with client_user_id assigns to client
Backend: GET /api/assessment/my (as client) returns assigned sessions
Backend: GET /api/admin/leads returns leads with stage_counts
Backend: PATCH /api/admin/leads/{id} updates status to qualified
Backend: POST /api/admin/leads/{id}/events adds activity log
Backend: GET /api/admin/clients returns clients with project_count and assessment_count
Backend: GET /api/admin/clients/{id} returns client detail with projects, assessments, lead
Frontend: Admin Assessment page - Sessions tab shows Client/User column and Due Date
Frontend: Admin Assessment page - Templates tab shows 5 templates with Published/Draft badges
Frontend: Admin Assessment page - 'Buat Assessment' button opens dialog (but form fields don't render due to bug)
Frontend: Admin Leads page - Kanban view shows all 6 columns (New/Contacted/Qualified/Proposal/Won/Lost)
Frontend: Admin Leads page - Lead cards display with 4 leads visible
Frontend: Admin Leads page - Clicking lead card opens detail drawer
Frontend: Admin Leads page - Drawer shows 6 stage buttons and Add Note textarea
Frontend: Admin Clients page - Shows 1 client with Email, Status, Proyek (2), Assessment (2) columns
Frontend: Admin Clients page - Clicking client row navigates to detail page
Frontend: Client detail page - Shows 4 tabs (Overview/Proyek/Assessment/Lead Asal)
Frontend: Client detail page - 'Assign Assessment' button present
Frontend: Client portal - 'Assessment' navigation item in sidebar
Frontend: Client portal - /portal/assessments page shows 2 assigned assessments
Frontend: Client portal - Assessment cards show progress bar and action buttons

success_percentage.frontend: 92% (24/26 tests passed - 1 critical bug blocking 2 tests)

items.issue: Fix React SelectItem empty value error in AdminAssessments.jsx
items.fix: Change to <SelectItem value="_none">— Tanpa binding —</SelectItem> and update form submission logic at line 257 to handle '_none' value (convert to empty string or undefined)
items.impact: This blocks admin from creating assessment sessions via UI. Backend API works fine, only UI is broken.

phase_20a.backend: ✅ All 5 backend tests passed - Template CRUD, assignment with client_user_id, and client portal API all working
phase_20a.frontend: ⚠️ Partially working - Sessions/Templates tabs display correctly, but 'Buat Assessment' dialog has critical React error preventing form fields from rendering. Client portal assessment page works perfectly.

phase_20b.backend: ✅ All 3 backend tests passed - Leads pipeline with stage_counts, status updates, and event logging all working
phase_20b.frontend: ✅ Fully working - Kanban view with 6 columns, lead cards, detail drawer with stage buttons and Add Note form all functional. List view toggle works.

phase_20c.backend: ✅ All 2 backend tests passed - Client list with counts and client detail with projects/assessments/lead all working
phase_20c.frontend: ✅ Fully working - Client table displays correctly, navigation to detail page works, all 4 tabs present, Assign Assessment button present (though it likely has same dialog bug as AdminAssessments)

screenshots.clients_page: Shows 'Manajemen Klien' page with 1 client (Client Demo) displaying Email, Status (Aktif), Proyek (2), Assessment (2)
screenshots.client_detail: Shows client detail page with tabs and 'Assign Assessment' button, stats showing 2 Proyek and 2 Assessment
screenshots.assessment_dialog_error: Shows React runtime error: 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string' blocking dialog rendering
